mapper.sql: SELECT qli.question_list_id, qli.rank, q.question_id, q.category_id, q.title, q.difficulty, q.exam_point, q.view_count FROM question_list_item qli INNER JOIN question q ON q.question_id = qli.question_id
mapper.select: WHERE qli.question_list_id = #{questionListId} ORDER BY qli.rank ASC, qli.question_id ASC
